Table	Create Table
review_actions	CREATE TABLE `review_actions` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `letterRequestId` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `reviewerId` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `actorType` enum('system','subscriber','employee','admin') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `action` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `noteText` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `noteVisibility` enum('internal','user_visible') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'internal',
  `fromStatus` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `toStatus` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  KEY `idx_review_actions_letterRequestId` (`letterRequestId`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=60001
